residents.title: Guide
dialogue: The roads connect at the edges out there. Keep your bearings.
If you clear a whole floor, claim the boon before moving on.
residents.name: Brace

residents.title: Scout
dialogue: If something important comes into view, stop and reassess.
Open ground favors range. Tight ground favors nerve.
residents.name: Alden

residents.title: Chicken
dialogue: The chicken scratches at the ground.

residents.title: Chicken
dialogue: The chicken pecks at something near the path.

residents.title: Dog
dialogue: The dog sniffs at the air nearby.

residents.title: Dog
dialogue: The dog circles once, then sits.
